fields.label: Overline
fields.name: inquiry_form_overline
fields.instructions: Small eyebrow label above the heading, e.g. "Get Started".

fields.label: Intro
fields.name: inquiry_form_intro
fields.instructions: Short supporting sentence under the heading.

fields.label: Large
fields.name: inquiry_form_large
fields.instructions: Use the larger, wider variant with more generous spacing.

fields.label: Gravity Form ID
fields.name: inquiry_form_gravity_form_id
fields.instructions: ID of the Gravity Form to embed. Leave empty to show the static fallback form.

fields.label: Button Label (fallback)
fields.name: inquiry_form_button_label
fields.instructions: Submit button text used by the static fallback form only.

fields.label: Small Print
fields.name: inquiry_form_small
fields.instructions: Fine print under the form. Basic links allowed, e.g. a privacy policy link.
